connections.gloss: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

connections.def: feminine (abstract) of a compound of 3624 and the base of 1430; architecture, i.e. (concretely) a structure; figuratively, confirmation:--building, edify(-ication, -ing). see GREEK for 3624 see GREEK…
